ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., pitcher, catcher, infielder, outfielder) */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Player's batting hand (left or right) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Player's throwing hand (left or right) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamid")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "seasonid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonid")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performanceid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "seasonid" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "strikeouts_per_9" REAL /* Strikeouts per 9 innings */,
  "walks_per_9" REAL /* Walks per 9 innings */,
  "home_runs_per_9" REAL /* Home runs per 9 innings */,
  "batting_average_on_balls_in_play" REAL /* Batting average on balls in play */,
  "left_on_base_percentage" REAL /* Left on base percentage */,
  "ground_ball_percentage" REAL /* Ground ball percentage */,
  "home_runs_per_fly_ball" REAL /* Home runs per fly ball */,
  "fastball_velocity" REAL /* Average fastball velocity */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "fielding_independent_pitching" REAL /* Fielding independent pitching */,
  "expected_fielding_independent_pitching" REAL /* Expected fielding independent pitching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performanceid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_seasonid FOREIGN KEY ("seasonid") REFERENCES seasons ("seasonid")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_metrics" (
  "metricid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced metric record */,
  "performanceid" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "xera" REAL /* Expected earned run average */,
  "fip" REAL /* Fielding independent pitching */,
  "xfip" REAL /* Expected fielding independent pitching */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins above replacement */,
  "waa" REAL /* Wins above average */,
  "wpa" REAL /* Win probability added */,
  "braa" REAL /* Batting runs above average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metricid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_metrics_performanceid FOREIGN KEY ("performanceid") REFERENCES player_performance ("performanceid")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "gameid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "seasonid" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameid")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player_performance" (
  "performanceid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "gameid" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performanceid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_performance_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_performance_gameid FOREIGN KEY ("gameid") REFERENCES games ("gameid")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injuryid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "days_missed" INTEGER /* Number of days missed due to injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injuryid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transactionid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "from_team" TEXT /* Team the player was traded from */,
  "to_team" TEXT /* Team the player was traded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transactionid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid")
)
column_names: Player's position (e.g., pitcher, catcher, infielder, outfielder)
Round the player was drafted in
City where the team is based
State where the team is based
Country where the team is based
